title: Heavy Duty Metal Broom Brush Handle Bracket with Adjustable Brace Diameter to Support Fixed Push Broom Handles (3)
features: HEAVY-DUTY BROOM BRACKET: our metal broom handle bracket stay is made of metal for tough broom support so your broom can take on repeated heavy use time and time again
FIXED PUSH BROOM HANDLE: our steel push broom bracket will provide you a securely fastened handle so you can use your push broom with confidence

EASY FIXING: our broom brace has standard slots, so you can use screws or bolts to secure it to the broom; its design provides an easy and tight-fitting of your push broom parts (fixings are not supplied)
CONVENIENT BROOM STORAGE: these metal support brackets will make you able to detach broom handle for convenient storage

VERSATILE BROOM BRACKET: suitable for most type of broom heads, it is designed to fit standard size broom handle brace of 1 1/8 inch and the diameter can be adjusted to fit by means of the wing nut and screw to take most popular diameter handles
description: The Dustpan and Brush Store. We supply professional cleaning equipment for domestic and industrial use. Our solid and heavy-duty bracket will support your broom handle for safe use in deep cleaning with your push broom. Our bracket is tough, easy to fix and adjustable for the most popular diameter handles.
